query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.email, c.contactTrustTier, c.roleRelevance FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON c.id = cp.contactId WHERE cp.projectId = 630011 ORDER BY c.contactTrustTier, c.roleRelevance;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.email, c.contactTrustTier, c.roleRelevance FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON c.id = cp.contactId WHERE cp.projectId = 630011 ORDER BY c.contactTrustTier, c.roleRelevance;
